whats_new.title: Oracle GoldenGate support for database artificial intelligence (AI)
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate adds artificial intelligence support with the following data types:

whats_new.title: Configuration service to store critical configuration data
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate now supports a new Configuration Service for managing the configuration files of Oracle GoldenGate for high availability (HA) purposes. For more information, see Configuration Service .

whats_new.title: Data streaming service
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate introduces the data streaming service. This service enables simplified access to database change records, provides continuous ETL, and real-time analytics over a web socket connection. For more information, see About Data Streaming Service .

whats_new.title: Monitor Oracle GoldenGate statistics
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate supports StatsD, which is an open-source network daemon that listens for statistics, like counters and timers, sent over TCP and sends aggregates to one or more pluggable backend services. Oracle GoldenGate Microservice Architecture sends metrics to the Performance Metrics Service and writes metrics in StatsD format to a StatsD daemon or a time series databases that supports ingestion of StatsD metrics.

whats_new.title: Trail file management
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate has introduced the ability to manage trail files directly, including the ability to create archive tasks and delete trail files.

whats_new.title: Support for new TRANLOGOPTIONS parameter
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate adds support for the new TRANLOGOPTIONS EXCLUDEFILTERTABLE parameter. This parameter replaces the TRANLOGOPTIONS FILTERTABLE parameter but supports the same functionality. For more information, see TRANLOGOPTIONS .

whats_new.title: Support for Db2 version 13 for z/OS
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate now supports Db2 version 13 for z/OS.

whats_new.title: Support for new DISTINCT data type
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate now supports the new DISTINCT data type for Db2 for i, Db2 LUW, and Db2 z/OS.

whats_new.title: New user interface for Oracle GoldenGate Microservices Architecture
whats_new.description: The Oracle GoldenGate Microservices Architecture web interface has been renewed with improved capabilities and enhanced user experience.

whats_new.title: Oracle GoldenGate features for Oracle AI Database
Integrated health checks and alerts for integrated Replicat and Extract in Oracle GoldenGate Microservices
whats_new.description: Diagnose and troubleshoot integrated Replicat and Extract processes in Oracle AI Database from Oracle GoldenGate Microservices.

whats_new.title: DDL notification on target tables for Replicat
whats_new.description: Starting with Oracle GoldenGate, Replicat uses efficient table DDL change notification to invalidate any cached metadata when you perform a DDL operation on the target table.

whats_new.title: Support coexistence of Oracle GoldenGate with Data Guard Pluggable Database (DGPDB)
whats_new.description: Oracle AI Database functionality has been extended to allow using Oracle GoldenGate in a PDB-based Data Guard (DGPDB) environment in parallel. See Support for DGPDB .

whats_new.title: New CHKPTDUMP utility
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate includes a new utility called chkptdump , which enables dumping content from checkpoint files. For details, see Location of Programs and Utilities Accessible from the Admin Client .

behavior_changes.title: Oracle GoldenGate features for Oracle AI Database
behavior_changes.description: User roles to grant role-based privileges for Oracle AI Database

deprecated.title: Oracle GoldenGate has deprecated Integrated Replicat
deprecated.description: Starting with Oracle GoldenGate, integrated Replicat has been deprecated. As an alternative, you can use parallel Replicat in Integrated mode.

deprecated.title: Oracle GoldenGate has desupported Oracle GoldenGate Classic Architecture
deprecated.description: Starting with Oracle GoldenGate, Oracle GoldenGate Classic Architecture has been desupported.

deprecated.title: Oracle GoldenGate has desupported the following parameters:
deprecated.description: Starting with Oracle GoldenGate, the following parameters have been desupported: FILTERTABLE GETREPLICATES GETAPPLOPS IGNOREREPLICATES IGNOREAPPLOPS SHOWSYNTAX Note: The TRANLOGOPTIONS FILTERTABLE parameter has been replaced with the EXCLUDEFILTERTABLE parameter, but with the same functionality.

deprecated.title: Oracle GoldenGate has desupported Blowfish encryption
deprecated.description: Starting with Oracle GoldenGate, Blowfish encryption algorithm has been desupported.

deprecated.title: Oracle GoldenGate has desupported the Trace Table functionality
deprecated.description: Starting with Oracle GoldenGate, the trace table functionality has been desupported for Oracle AI Database . Therefore, the following parameters and commands are also desupported: Parameters : TRACETABLE NOTRACETABLE Commands : ADD TRACETABLE DELETE TRACETABLE INFO TRACETABLE

deprecated.title: Oracle GoldenGate has desupported six-digit trail file
deprecated.description: Starting with Oracle GoldenGate, the six-digit trail file has been desupported.

deprecated.title: Oracle GoldenGate has desupported the use of userid and password in Extract and Replicat parameter files
deprecated.description: Starting with Oracle GoldenGate, the use of userid and password in the Extract and Replicat parameter files has been desupported. Alternatively, you need to use the useridalias option.
